en.title: Returns & Refund Policy
en.description: 1. Return Eligibility You may apply for return or exchange within 30 days after receiving your items. Products must be unused, undamaged and kept in original packaging to qualify for return. 2. Non-Returnable Items Customized goods, clearance sale items and damaged goods caused by improper personal use cannot be returned. 3. Return Shipping Cost If […]

sections.heading: 1. Return Eligibility
paragraphs: You may apply for return or exchange within 30 days after receiving your items. Products must be unused, undamaged and kept in original packaging to qualify for return.

sections.heading: 2. Non-Returnable Items
paragraphs: Customized goods, clearance sale items and damaged goods caused by improper personal use cannot be returned.

sections.heading: 3. Return Shipping Cost
paragraphs: If the item has quality defects or shipping errors on our side, we cover return shipping fees. If you return items due to personal preference, you need to bear the return delivery cost.

sections.heading: 4. Refund Process
paragraphs: Once we receive and inspect the returned goods, we will issue your full or partial refund within 5–7 business days to your original payment account.

sections.heading: 5. Damaged/Lost Goods
paragraphs: Please contact our customer service with photos of damaged items within 7 days after delivery. We will arrange re-delivery or full refund for verified defective products.

sections.heading: 1. 退货条
paragraphs: 自签收之日起 30 天内可申请退货或换货。商品须未使用、无损坏，并保持原包装完好，方可受理退货

sections.heading: 2. 不可退货商
paragraphs: 定制商品、清仓特价商品，以及因个人使用不当造成的损坏，不在退货范围内

sections.heading: 3. 退货运
paragraphs: 如因产品质量问题或我方发货错误导致退货，退货运费由我方承担。如因个人原因退货，退货运费由买家承担

sections.heading: 4. 退款流
paragraphs: 收到退货并完成检验后，我们将?5? 个工作日内将全额或部分退款退回您的原支付账户

sections.heading: 5. 破损/丢失商品
paragraphs: 如货物送达?7 天内发现破损，请携带照片联系客服。经核实为质量问题的，我们将安排补发或全额退款

sections.heading: 1. 返品の対
paragraphs: 商品到着?30 日以内に返品・交換を申請できます。未使用・無傷で、元の包装が保持されている場合に限り返品を受け付けます

sections.heading: 2. 返品不可の商
paragraphs: カスタム品、在庫処分セール品、お客様の不適切な使用による破損品は返品できません

sections.heading: 3. 返品送料
paragraphs: 品質不良または当社の発送ミスの場合、返品送料は当社負担です。お客様都合の返品の場合、返品送料はお客様負担となります

sections.heading: 4. 返金手続
paragraphs: 返品商品の受領・検品後??営業日以内に全額または一部を元のお支払い口座へ返金します

sections.heading: 5. 破損・紛
paragraphs: 配達?7 日以内に破損があった場合は、写真とともにカスタマーサービスまでご連絡ください。不良品と確認できた場合、再発送または全額返金いたします

en.title: Privacy Policy
en.description: 1. Information We Collect We collect personal information you provide when placing orders, including your name, shipping address, email address and phone number. We also automatically collect device and browsing data to improve our service. 2. Use of Your Information We use your data to process orders, arrange delivery, send order updates and respond to […]

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
paragraphs: We collect personal information you provide when placing orders, including your name, shipping address, email address and phone number. We also automatically collect device and browsing data to improve our service.

sections.heading: 2. Use of Your Information
paragraphs: We use your data to process orders, arrange delivery, send order updates and respond to your support requests. We will never sell or rent your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 3. Data Security
paragraphs: We take reasonable technical measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss or leakage.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
paragraphs: This website uses cookies to optimize browsing experience. You may disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

sections.heading: 5. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please email us via the contact page.

sections.heading: 1. 我们收集的信
paragraphs: 在您下单时，我们会收集您提供的姓名、收货地址、电子邮箱和电话号码等个人信息。我们也会自动收集设备和浏览数据，以改进服务体验

sections.heading: 2. 信息的使
paragraphs: 我们使用您的信息处理订单、安排配送、发送订单更新并回复您的咨询。我们不会向第三方出售或出租您的个人信息用于营销目的

sections.heading: 3. 数据安全
paragraphs: 我们采取合理的技术措施，防止您的个人数据遭到未经授权的访问、丢失或泄露

sections.heading: 4. Cookie
paragraphs: 本网站使?Cookie 以优化浏览体验。您可随时在浏览器设置中禁用 Cookie

sections.heading: 5. 联系我们
paragraphs: 如对本隐私政策有疑问，请通过联系页面发送邮件与我们联系

ja.title: プライバシーポリシー

sections.heading: 1. 収集する情報
paragraphs: ご注文時にご提供いただく氏名、配送先住所、メールアドレス、電話番号などの個人情報を収集します。また、サービス改善のため、端末情報や閲覧データを自動的に収集する場合があります

sections.heading: 2. お客様情報の利用
paragraphs: お客様の情報は、注文処理、配送手配、注文状況の通知、お問い合わせ対応のために使用します。マーケティング目的で第三者に個人情報を販売・貸与することはありません

sections.heading: 3. データセキュリテ
paragraphs: 不正アクセス、紛失、漏洩から個人データを守るため、合理的な技術的措置を講じています

sections.heading: 4. Cookie
paragraphs: 本サイトは閲覧体験の最適化のためにCookieを使用します。ブラウザ設定でいつでもCookieを無効にできます

sections.heading: 5. お問い合わせ
paragraphs: 本プライバシーポリシーに関するご質問は、お問い合わせページよりメールでご連絡ください

en.title: Shipping Policy
en.description: 1. Processing Time All orders will be processed within 1–3 business days after payment confirmation. Orders are not shipped on weekends and holidays. 2. Delivery Time We ship worldwide from China. - United Kingdom: 10–20 business days - United States, Canada, Australia: 12–25 business days - European Union countries: 12–22 business days Delivery delays may […]

sections.heading: 1. Processing Time
paragraphs: All orders will be processed within 1–3 business days after payment confirmation. Orders are not shipped on weekends and holidays.

sections.heading: 2. Delivery Time
paragraphs: We ship worldwide from China.
- United Kingdom: 10–20 business days
- United States, Canada, Australia: 12–25 business days
- European Union countries: 12–22 business days
Delivery delays may occur due to customs clearance or logistics exceptions.

sections.heading: 3. Shipping Cost
paragraphs: Standard flat shipping rate applies to all orders. Free shipping offers may be available during promotional activities.

sections.heading: 4. Customs Duties
paragraphs: Buyers are responsible for any import taxes, customs duties or local fees charged by your country’s customs department.

sections.heading: 5. Shipping Exceptions
paragraphs: We are not liable for lost or damaged packages caused by incorrect address information provided by customers.

sections.heading: 1. 处理时效
paragraphs: 所有订单在付款确认?1? 个工作日内处理。周末及法定节假日不发货

sections.heading: 2. 配送时
paragraphs: 我们从中国发往全球各地
- 英国?0?0 个工作日
- 美国、加拿大、澳大利亚：12?5 个工作日
- 欧盟国家?2?2 个工作日
因清关或物流异常，配送可能出现延迟

sections.heading: 3. 运费
paragraphs: 所有订单适用统一标准运费。促销活动期间可能提供免运费优惠

sections.heading: 4. 关税
paragraphs: 进口税、关税及当地海关收取的其他费用由买家自行承担

sections.heading: 5. 物流免责
paragraphs: 因客户提供错误地址信息导致的包裹丢失或损坏，我方不承担责任

sections.heading: 1. 処理期間
paragraphs: ご入金確認後??営業日以内に注文を処理します。週末および祝日は発送いたしません

sections.heading: 2. 配送期
paragraphs: 中国から世界各国へ発送します
- イギリス?0?0 営業
- アメリカ、カナダ、オーストラリア?2?5 営業
- EU諸国?2?2 営業
通関手続きや物流上の例外により、配送が遅れる場合があります

sections.heading: 3. 送料
paragraphs: すべてのご注文に標準一律送料が適用されます。キャンペーン期間中は送料無料となる場合があります

sections.heading: 4. 関税・輸入税
paragraphs: 輸入税、関税、現地税関が課すその他の費用は、お客様のご負担となります

sections.heading: 5. 配送の免責
paragraphs: お客様による誤った住所情報に起因する荷物の紛失・破損について、当社は責任を負いません
Welcome to YBB Tackle Wholesale ("YBB", "we", "our", or "us"). These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of https://carp-ybb.com.
By accessing or purchasing from our website, you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: Products
paragraphs: YBB specializes in fishing tackle and accessories for wholesale distributors, tackle shops, online retailers, and individual customers.
Product specifications, images, and pricing may be updated without prior notice. Minor differences in packaging or appearance do not affect product functionality.

sections.heading: Orders
paragraphs: All orders are subject to acceptance and product availability.
We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order due to:
?Pricing errors
?Inventory shortages
?Payment authorization failure
?Suspected fraudulent activity

sections.heading: Payment
paragraphs: Orders must be paid in full before shipment.
Payments are securely processed through our authorized payment partners.
We do not store customers' payment card information.

sections.heading: Shipping
paragraphs: We ship worldwide.
Shipping costs are calculated during checkout.
Delivery times are estimates and may vary because of customs inspections, carrier delays, weather conditions, or other circumstances beyond our control.

sections.heading: Taxes & Duties
paragraphs: International customers are responsible for any import duties, customs clearance charges, VAT, GST, or other local taxes imposed by their country.

sections.heading: Returns
paragraphs: Please review our Refund & Return Policy for detailed return conditions.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, graphics, product descriptions, and designs, remains the property of YBB.
Unauthorized copying or commercial use is prohibited.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: YBB shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our products or website.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: Questions regarding these Terms may be sent to:
Email: sales@carp-ybb.com
Website: https://carp-ybb.com

sections.heading: 1. B2B 批发条款
paragraphs: 除非另有说明，所有价格为 EXW。付款条件：30% 定金?0% 发货前付清，除非已批准账期

sections.heading: 2. 产品规格
paragraphs: 货物按确认样品及 PO 规格供应。索赔须在收货后 14 天内提出并附证明材料

sections.heading: 1. B2B 卸売条件
paragraphs: 特に記載がない限り、すべての価格は EXW です。支払条件：30% 前金、出荷前 70%（与信承認時を除く）

sections.heading: 2. 製品仕様
paragraphs: 承認サンプルおよ?PO 確認に基づき供給します。クレームは受領?14 日以内に証拠を添えてご連絡ください
